proposed_improvements.title: Require configuration binding checks in review criteria
proposed_improvements.description: Ask implementor and reviewer to verify that environment-driven values are read at runtime rather than captured at import/definition time when mutation or test overrides are expected.

proposed_improvements.title: Mandate explicit negative-path test cases
proposed_improvements.description: Require at least one test for retry exhaustion and one test for non-retryable error handling whenever retry logic is implemented.

proposed_improvements.title: Embed review artifact linkage requirements
proposed_improvements.description: Instruct code-implementor-agent to include PR URL and findings artifact path in a single structured checklist item to simplify auditability.
